# Step 07: Migrate UI
# VB6 Forms → Blazor Server Components
# Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI

## VB6 Form → Blazor Page Mapping

| VB6 Form              | Blazor Component                        | Key Changes                          |
|-----------------------|-----------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| frmLogin.frm          | (ASP.NET Core Identity — future step)  | BCrypt hashing, cookie auth          |
| frmMain.frm (MDI)     | MainLayout.razor + NavMenu.razor       | Sidebar nav replaces menu bar        |
| (Status bar)          | Home.razor (Dashboard)                  | Real-time cards + table summary      |
| frmWorkOrder.frm      | WorkOrders/WorkOrderList.razor          | List + detail view, status filter    |
| frmInventory.frm      | Inventory/InventoryList.razor           | Color-coded stock table              |
| frmQualityCheck.frm   | QualityControl/QualityCheckForm.razor   | Form + recent inspections list       |
| frmShipping.frm       | Shipping/ShippingManifest.razor         | Create manifest + shipment list      |
| frmPartLookup.frm     | Parts/PartLookup.razor                  | Real-time search                     |
| frmReports.frm        | (Report viewer — future enhancement)   | QuestPDF or built-in tables          |

## Program.cs Configuration
- Registered all 5 service interfaces → implementations via DI
- Configured CostCalculationSettings from appsettings.json
- EF Core InMemoryDatabase for development/demo
- Database seeded on startup via DatabaseSeeder

## appsettings.json
- CostCalculation section with configurable labor rate, hours/part, overhead %

## UI Features Migrated
1. **Dashboard** — Active/overdue/completed WO counts, low stock alerts, recent orders table
2. **Work Orders** — Filterable list with status badges, click-through detail view
3. **Inventory** — Supplier filter, color-coded stock status (red/yellow/green), value column
4. **Quality Control** — New inspection form with result → auto-hold on fail, recent list
5. **Shipping** — Carrier dropdown, tracking numbers, auto-completes work orders
6. **Parts Lookup** — Real-time search across part number, description, material

## VB6 UI Anti-Patterns Resolved
| VB6 Pattern                     | Blazor Replacement                    |
|---------------------------------|---------------------------------------|
| MSFlexGrid with bubble sort     | HTML tables with server-side ordering |
| DoEvents for responsiveness     | Async/await rendering                 |
| Timer-based auto-refresh        | SignalR real-time (built-in Blazor)   |
| MsgBox for alerts               | Bootstrap alerts + toast              |
| MDI parent/child windows        | SPA with sidebar navigation           |
| CommonDialog file picker        | HTML file input (future)              |
| Menu permission toggling        | Role-based UI rendering (future)      |
